subcodes.first_line: O God, Who quickeneth souls with the pure and perfumed breaths wafting from the sacred gardens in the midst of Paradise, I take refuge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا محیی النفوس بانفاس طیب عبقت من حدائق القدس فی بحبوحه الفردوس انی الوذ
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
